name: Mid-Century Modern Sofa
description: A stylish and comfortable 3-seater sofa with walnut legs and premium fabric upholstery.

name: Oak Wood Dining Table
description: Solid white oak dining table that seats six comfortably. Hand-finished with natural oil.

name: Velvet Armchair
description: Deep emerald green velvet armchair with gold-finished steel legs.

name: Minimalist Platform Bed
description: King-size platform bed frame made from sustainable pine wood. No box spring required.

name: Industrial Bookshelf
description: Five-tier open shelving unit featuring a mix of reclaimed wood and matte black iron.

name: Scandinavian Coffee Table
description: Round coffee table with a white lacquered top and light birch wood legs.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Breathable mesh back chair with adjustable lumbar support and 4D armrests.

name: Marble Top Side Table
description: Elegant side table with a genuine Carrara marble top and brushed brass frame.

name: Rustic Wardrobe
description: Large double-door wardrobe with a distressed wood finish and antique iron handles.

name: Woven Rattan Lounge Chair
description: Hand-woven natural rattan chair, perfect for sunrooms or covered patios.

name: Floating Wall Shelves
description: Set of three hidden-bracket floating shelves in a dark espresso finish.

name: Leather Bar Stool
description: Counter-height bar stool upholstered in top-grain cognac leather.

name: Glass Top Desk
description: Tempered glass work surface with a minimalist chrome trestle base.

name: Floor Arc Lamp
description: Overarching floor lamp with a marble base and fabric drum shade.

name: Tufted Headboard
description: Diamond-stitched button tufted headboard in a neutral linen fabric.

name: Nesting Side Tables
description: Set of two space-saving nesting tables with black metal frames.

name: Ceramic Table Lamp
description: Hand-glazed ceramic base with a tapered white linen lampshade.

name: Reclaimed Wood Mirror
description: Full-length floor mirror framed in authentic reclaimed barn wood.

name: Modern TV Stand
description: Sleek media console with cable management and sliding slatted doors.

name: Outdoor Bistro Set
description: Three-piece metal patio set including a small round table and two folding chairs.
